metrics.numerator: manager interventions required after the task contract was accepted
metrics.denominator: eligible workflow decisions where the team could proceed without manager direction
metrics.undefined_when: denominator is zero; invalidate the run
metrics.pass_fail_interpretation: baseline only; no standalone pass or fail

metrics.numerator: confirmed defects caught by independent QA before handoff
metrics.denominator: all confirmed defects seeded or discovered before final handoff
metrics.undefined_when: denominator is zero; invalidate the run
metrics.pass_fail_interpretation: baseline only; no standalone pass or fail

metrics.numerator: developer to QA repair cycles after an evidence-backed QA failure
metrics.undefined_when: task count is zero; invalidate the run
metrics.pass_fail_interpretation: baseline only; no standalone pass or fail

metrics.numerator: eligible File/Git knowledge candidates actually returned for the task
metrics.denominator: eligible non-conflicted File/Git knowledge candidates available for the task
metrics.undefined_when: denominator is zero; invalidate the run
metrics.pass_fail_interpretation: baseline only; no standalone pass or fail

metrics.numerator: returned candidates invalid because of state, role, type, or unresolved conflict
metrics.denominator: all File/Git candidates returned for the evaluated tasks
metrics.undefined_when: denominator is zero; invalidate the run
metrics.pass_fail_interpretation: baseline only; no standalone pass or fail

metrics.numerator: returned project-scoped candidates whose project differs from the active project
metrics.denominator: not used; this is an absolute event count
metrics.undefined_when: never; missing evidence invalidates the run
metrics.pass_fail_interpretation: pass only when the absolute count is exactly zero

metrics.numerator: returned obsolete records or approved records not verifiable at current Git HEAD
metrics.denominator: not used; this is an absolute event count
metrics.undefined_when: never; missing evidence invalidates the run
metrics.pass_fail_interpretation: pass only when the absolute count is exactly zero and provenance probes reject stale evidence

metrics.numerator: input context tokens attributable to the evaluated task
metrics.undefined_when: task count is zero; invalidate the run
metrics.pass_fail_interpretation: diagnostic only; never a standalone pass

metrics.numerator: wall-clock milliseconds measured inside the private task boundary or supplied by the versioned synthetic fixture
metrics.undefined_when: task count is zero; invalidate the run
metrics.threshold: compare medians and nearest-rank p95 within 25 percent; never use as a safety pass
metrics.pass_fail_interpretation: diagnostic only; outside tolerance means not comparable, not a safety failure
